channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live
item.description: Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham latest: Vote for me is a vote to change Labour, Manchester mayor tells Makerfield as he unveils slogan
item.description: Andy Burnham latest: Vote for me is a vote to change Labour, Manchester mayor tells Makerfield as he unveils slogan

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian

Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: How to build a good prime minister: We've fucked it up not once, not twice, but at least seven times in succession. Maybe let's do it differently this time iandunt.substack.com/p/how-to-bui...
item.description: How to build a good prime minister: We've fucked it up not once, not twice, but at least seven times in succession. Maybe let's do it differently this time iandunt.substack.com/p/how-to-bui...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Healey asks Farage if any of £5m gift may have come from Russia-linked profits
item.description: Healey asks Farage if any of £5m gift may have come from Russia-linked profits

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer bans Labour councillors from doing deals with Polanski’s Green Party
item.description: Starmer bans Labour councillors from doing deals with Polanski’s Green Party

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Vile performative bullshit with a bogus rationale. A disgrace.
"This week some of Britain’s most senior former military chiefs signed a joint letter to Starmer, first reported by The Times, warning that cutting forei...
item.description:
Vile performative bullshit with a bogus rationale. A disgrace.
"This week some of Britain’s most senior former military chiefs signed a joint letter to Starmer, first reported by The Times, warning that cutting forei...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I’m really excited about this series: @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social will be drawing on her experience reporting on Greater Manchester, its policies and politics, to explain in great detail what makes Andy Burnham tick, e...

item.title: Byline Times: 'This EHRC Code Will Make the UK a Hostile Environment for Trans People'
